changes.value: **File:** `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/refresh.ts:50-57`\n\nHardcodes fetching only `\"task\"` and `\"actor\"` entity lists, plus tags from board data. New entity types won't be fetched. Should discover entity types from schema and fetch all of them.
